title: Configurable Status Update on Field Mapping
story: As a data migration specialist, I want to choose what migration status is automatically applied when I map a field, so that the workflow matches my team's review process — whether that means marking fields as 'Complete' or requiring a QA step.
description:
Add a configurable "Update Status on Match" option that lets users choose what migration status is automatically set when they map a field. Different customers have different workflows — some want mapped fields set to "Complete" immediately, while others want them set to "QA" for a review step.

The setting is a global option (not per-object) presented as a dropdown. It applies to both auto-matching and individual field mapping in the side panel.

After discussion, the dropdown was moved to the first step of adding a new data source, so it's set once when configuring the source rather than during each mapping session.
acceptance_criteria: Dropdown allows selecting which status to set when a field is mapped
Setting applies globally to all mapping operations (auto-match and manual)
Dropdown is presented during the first step of adding a new data source
Selected status is applied both for auto-match and individual field mappings
Status options include available migration statuses
ux_changes: New 'Update Status on Match' dropdown added to the data source creation step. Users select the desired status that will be auto-applied when fields are mapped.
middleware_changes: Mapping save logic updated to read the configured status preference and apply it when a mapping is created, for both auto-match and individual mappings.
data_model_changes: New field to store the user's preferred mapping status at the data source level.
api_changes: Data source creation and mapping endpoints updated to accept and apply the status preference.
implementation_notes: Initially placed on the auto-match screen but moved to the data source creation step after discussion, making it a one-time global setting per source. The dropdown shows available migration statuses from the system.
comment_summary: Developer implemented the dropdown on the auto-match screen initially. After discussion, it was decided to move it to the first step of adding a new data source for a better UX. The setting was made global to apply to all mapping methods.
